title: Ppomppu OTT Competitor Ads Intelligence (Manual Collection)
purpose: Define a manual, one-time-per-post collection workflow that extracts competitor ad details from Ppomppu OTT board posts into a structured dataset with audit artifacts.
design_intent: Prefer deterministic, low-volume scraping and extraction with strong evidence retention. Use HTML parsing for text ads first, then OCR and VLM only when needed. Keep the pipeline manual and fail-closed on ambiguous extraction.
change_impact: Adds a new manual collection module and data schema. No changes to scheduler, publisher, or existing observer behavior.

in: Manual trigger only (CLI or internal API)
HTML text parsing for text-based ads
Image pipeline for embedded ad images (OCR first, VLM fallback)
Structured output table + raw evidence retention

assumptions: Approx. 20 unique vendors, one-time per vendor post
Local GPU available (RTX 24GB VRAM, 64 GB RAM)
OCR and VLM models are available in a local Docker container (model list provided later)
Rate limits should be conservative to avoid triggering site defenses

entry_points.intent: Run a bounded collection job for a vendor list and a post URL list.
entry_points.idempotency: Skip posts already recorded in the output dataset.
entry_points.failure_policy: Fail-closed on extraction errors; record error artifact and continue to next post.

entry_points.intent: Optional internal endpoint to run the same job from the UI or a script.

pipeline.notes: Manual list is the source of truth; discovery only supplements if needed.
Use a stable fetcher (Playwright or HTTP) based on site behavior.
Reuse the existing HTML parser for text-based ads when possible.
Run OCR first for speed and determinism.
Fallback to VLM when OCR confidence is low or layout is complex.
Normalize to a stable schema and attach confidence + evidence links.
Write structured data and retain raw evidence for auditing.

selector_strategy.discovery: Use parser page_outline on sample posts to identify a stable post-content container.
selector_strategy.allowlist_policy: Persist a small allowlist of selectors; fall back to body when none match.

image_url_rules.source: img[src] within the selected content container
image_url_rules.normalization: Resolve relative URLs against the page URL

evidence_capture.raw_html: Persist full post HTML for audit and repro
evidence_capture.source_blocks: Store node path + excerpt as evidence.sources(type=html)
evidence_capture.selector_used: Record selector choice in normalization logs

html_extraction.fallback: If no text blocks or parser confidence < 0.6, capture a screenshot and route to OCR/VLM.

consistency_checks: prefer OCR numeric tokens unless VLM explicitly confirms
do not fabricate price_krw when OCR shows no price tokens

evidence_capture.ocr_text: Persist full OCR text per image
evidence_capture.field_evidence: Map fields to evidence sources with image_ref when relevant

image_pipeline.confidence_gate: Use VLM when OCR confidence < 0.75 or required fields missing.

extraction_policy.schema_validation: Strict schema validation for required fields; unknown fields stored as notes.
extraction_policy.evidence_requirement: Each structured field must link to text evidence (HTML or OCR/VLM excerpt).

checklist: Each sampled record has required fields populated
Each sampled record has evidence.sources with at least one excerpt
Product name and price_krw match source evidence
posted_at is ISO format; posted_at_raw captured when source is non-ISO
OCR/VLM outputs stored for image-based ads
Record marked failed when evidence is missing

evidence.field_evidence: optional map of field -> evidence sources

open_source_foundation_candidates.name: Playwright
open_source_foundation_candidates.role: Stable fetch and image capture when HTML requires JS.
open_source_foundation_candidates.reason: Already used in repo; consistent tooling.

open_source_foundation_candidates.name: Trafilatura or Readability
open_source_foundation_candidates.reason: High signal extraction for forum HTML.

open_source_foundation_candidates.name: Ollama + Qwen2.5-VL
open_source_foundation_candidates.role: OCR and VLM parsing for embedded ad images.
open_source_foundation_candidates.reason: Local inference with schema-constrained parsing and OCR extraction.

risk_register.risk: OCR or VLM hallucination introduces incorrect pricing.
risk_register.mitigation: Require evidence excerpts per field; fail-closed when missing evidence.
Fallback to screenshot + OCR pipeline; retain raw HTML for repro.
Polite throttling, low concurrency, manual-only runs.

risk_register.risk: Schema drift or missing fields across vendors.
risk_register.mitigation: Allow optional fields and store raw notes; keep core required fields minimal.

acceptance_criteria: Manual run can process a vendor list with idempotent skips for already-seen posts
Text-based ads parse into structured fields without OCR
Image-based ads extract at least product and price with evidence links
Artifacts are retained for every processed post
Structured output is written as compressed JSONL with run_id partitioning
No scheduler or publisher behavior is modified
